## [00:00 - 01:32]

This is a pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer and today we're going to talk about video publishing frequency. Let's go! How often should you post a new video? Everyone's looking for that sweet spot that's gonna help them go viral, reach the most people, and build their audience. I've heard some people say that three to five times is ideal, but I don't know about you, that just ain't happening. But I will say this, especially on TikTok, the more the better. That doesn't mean to flood the zone with a bunch of crap, but it does mean that you should not let quality be the reason why you haven't published today. One unpolished video is way better than no videos at all. You could still create a really good video. You can have standards while not putting a whole lot of time into it. So my recommendation is at least one video per day. So that's exactly what I'm doing. In 2023, I'm publishing at least one video every single day. That way you always expect to do it. You make it part of your routine and volume does help. So how often do you post new videos? So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok, do so at John Loomer. You can also keep following me here. Don't forget to subscribe, rate and review. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out.
